hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】这只鲜为人知的ETF在美伊战争期间上涨了600%以上，比石油或能源股更好的交易；【CRYPTO】比特币有望迎来一年来最好的月份。 50 亿美元 USDT 增长推动反弹；【WORLD】欧洲准备在乌克兰打一场更长时间的战争，但没有结束战争的战略。

items.title: This little-known ETF is up over 600% amid U.S.-Iran war, a better trade than oil or energy stocks
items.summary: The Breakwave Tanker Shipping ETF (BWET) has surged more than 600% since the beginning of the year, vastly outperforming crude oil and energy stocks.
items.title_zh: 这只鲜为人知的ETF在美伊战争期间上涨了600%以上，比石油或能源股更好的交易
items.summary_zh: 自今年年初以来，Breakwave Tanker Shipping ETF (BWET) 已飙升逾 600%，远远优于原油和能源股。

items.title: Bitcoin is on track for its best month in a year. $5 billion USDT growth fuels the rebound
items.summary: Strong earnings season trumps geopolitical risks for now, one trader said, as equities and crypto markets "stopped caring" about Iran war headlines.
items.title_zh: 比特币有望迎来一年来最好的月份。 50 亿美元 USDT 增长推动反弹
items.summary_zh: 一位交易员表示，强劲的财报季目前胜过地缘政治风险，因为股市和加密货币市场“不再关心”伊朗战争头条新闻。

items.title: Europe Prepares for a Longer War in Ukraine, With No Strategy to End It
items.summary: With American dealmakers wrapped up with Iran, neither Russia nor Ukraine has a clear path to victory — or toward a negotiated peace.
items.title_zh: 欧洲准备在乌克兰打一场更长时间的战争，但没有结束战争的战略
items.summary_zh: 随着美国交易撮合者与伊朗达成共识，俄罗斯和乌克兰都没有明确的胜利之路——或者通过谈判实现和平。

items.title: JPMorgan says tokenization will drive change across entire funds industry, but ‘good use cases’ still years away
items.summary: "Tokenization is that it will become part of the ETF ecosystem, but we’re a couple of years away from some good use cases,” said the bank.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示，代币化将推动整个基金行业的变革，但“良好的用例”还需要数年时间
items.summary_zh: 该银行表示：“代币化意味着它将成为 ETF 生态系统的一部分，但我们距离一些良好的用例还需要几年的时间。”

items.title: DOJ drops probe into Jerome Powell, paving the way for crypto-friendly Kevin Warsh to lead Fed
items.summary: The DOJ dropped its criminal investigation into Fed Chair Jerome Powell, clearing the way for the Senate to confirm Kevin Warsh.
items.title_zh: 美国司法部放弃对杰罗姆·鲍威尔的调查，为加密货币友好型凯文·沃什领导美联储铺平道路
items.summary_zh: 美国司法部撤销了对美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔的刑事调查，为参议院确认凯文·沃什的任命扫清了道路。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Calls Off Witkoff and Kushner’s Travel to Pakistan for Peace Talks
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普取消了威特科夫和库什纳前往巴基斯坦进行和平谈判的计划

items.title: Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire named Edgerton Award winners
items.summary: The associate professors of EECS and chemistry, respectively, are honored for exceptional contributions to teaching, research, and service at MIT.
items.title_zh: 雅各布·安德烈亚斯和布雷特·麦奎尔被评为埃哲顿奖获得者
items.summary_zh: EECS 和化学副教授分别因对麻省理工学院的教学、研究和服务做出的杰出贡献而受到表彰。

items.title: Human-machine teaming dives underwater
items.summary: Researchers are developing hardware and algorithms to improve collaboration between divers and autonomous underwater vehicles engaged in maritime missions.
items.title_zh: 人机协作潜入水下
items.summary_zh: 研究人员正在开发硬件和算法，以改善潜水员和执行海上任务的自主水下航行器之间的协作。

items.title: Helping data centers deliver higher performance with less hardware
items.summary: Researchers developed a system that intelligently balances workloads to improve the efficiency of flash storage hardware in a data center.
items.title_zh: 帮助数据中心以更少的硬件提供更高的性能
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种智能平衡工作负载的系统，以提高数据中心闪存存储硬件的效率。

items.title: Bessent defends U.S. dollar swap lines as Iran war harms global finances
items.summary: President Donald Trump, asked on CNBC's "Squawk Box" this week about a possible UAE swap line, appeared to say he is in favor of it.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争损害全球金融，贝森特捍卫美元互换额度
items.summary_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统本周在 CNBC 的“Squawk Box”节目中被问及可能的阿联酋互换额度时，似乎表示他赞成这一做法。

items.title: Nuclear reactor company X-energy shares surge 27% as AI drives interest in its IPO
items.summary: Advanced nuclear reactor company X-energy began trading Friday as the AI boom and electrification broadly spark a flurry of interest in the nuclear industry.
items.title_zh: 核反应堆公司 X-energy 股价飙升 27%，人工智能推动其 IPO 兴趣
items.summary_zh: 随着人工智能热潮和电气化广泛引发人们对核工业的浓厚兴趣，先进核反应堆公司 X-energy 于周五开始交易。

items.title: Bettors on Kalshi now see Warsh likely confirmed by mid-May after DOJ drops Powell probe
items.summary: Bettors on the platform now see an 86% chance that Warsh's nomination is confirmed by the U.S. Senate by May 15.
items.title_zh: 在司法部撤销鲍威尔调查后，卡尔希的投注者现在认为沃什可能会在五月中旬得到确认
items.summary_zh: 该平台上的投注者现在认为，沃什的提名在 5 月 15 日之前获得美国参议院批准的可能性为 86%。

items.title: The aerospace and defense trade is taking investors deeper into space, and more ETFs are up for the mission
items.summary: VettaFi's Cinthia Murphy finds more exchange-traded funds are tackling the space theme more directly as excitement over the SpaceX IPO grows.
items.title_zh: 航空航天和国防贸易正在将投资者带入更深入的太空，更多的 ETF 正准备迎接这一使命
items.summary_zh: VettaFi 的辛西娅·墨菲 (Cinthia Murphy) 发现，随着 SpaceX 首次公开募股 (IPO) 的热情日益高涨，越来越多的交易所交易基金正在更直接地探讨太空主题。

items.title: NYC Mayor Mamdani knocked Ken Griffin in pied-a-terre tax promo. His firm calls the move 'shameful'
items.summary: Chief Operating Officer Gerald Beeson saying in a memo that targeting Griffin showed "ignorance and disdain" toward contributors to the city's economy.
items.title_zh: 纽约市市长马姆达尼在临时税收促销活动中击败了肯·格里芬。他的公司称此举“可耻”
items.summary_zh: 首席运营官杰拉尔德·比森(Gerald Beeson)在一份备忘录中表示，针对格里芬表现出对该市经济贡献者的“无知和蔑视”。

items.title: Traders are betting on big moves in Intel on earnings
items.summary: Semiconductor stocks are powering the U.S. equity market to records and traders are predicting that means a big swing in shares of Intel after earnings tonight.
items.title_zh: 交易员押注英特尔盈利的重大变动
items.summary_zh: 半导体股正在推动美国股市创下历史新高，交易员预测这意味着今晚公布财报后英特尔股价将出现大幅波动。

items.title: Kalshi traders don't see Strait of Hormuz traffic returning to normal until July
items.summary: Chances that traffic returns to normal fell below 50% on Wednesday, according to Kalshi bettors, despite the U.S. and Iran extending the ceasefire.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希贸易商预计霍尔木兹海峡交通要到七月才能恢复正常
items.summary_zh: 据 Kalshi 投注者称，尽管美国和伊朗延长了停火期限，但周三交通恢复正常的可能性仍低于 50%。

items.title: Palestinians in West Bank and some in Gaza vote in local elections
items.summary: Local elections have been held in the occupied West Bank and in one Gazan city, though Hamas and other groups are not taking part.
items.title_zh: 约旦河西岸的巴勒斯坦人和加沙的一些巴勒斯坦人在地方选举中投票
items.summary_zh: 被占领的约旦河西岸和加沙一座城市已经举行了地方选举，但哈马斯和其他团体没有参加。

items.title: Nato says 'no provision' to expel members after report US could seek to suspend Spain
items.summary: An internal Pentagon email reportedly outlines options to punish allies over a perceived lack of support for Iran war.
items.title_zh: 北约称美国可能寻求暂停西班牙成员国资格后“没有规定”驱逐成员国
items.summary_zh: 据报道，五角大楼的一封内部电子邮件概述了因盟友缺乏对伊朗战争支持而惩罚盟友的选项。

items.title: Thousands at risk after multi-million dollar Everest flood warning system left to rust
items.summary: The flood warning system at Imja glacial lake has not been maintained since 2016, fearful locals tell BBC.
items.title_zh: 耗资数百万美元的珠穆朗玛峰洪水预警系统生锈，数千人面临危险
items.summary_zh: 恐惧的当地人告诉 BBC，伊姆贾冰川湖的洪水预警系统自 2016 年以来就没有维护过。

items.title: Thirty-one sloths die in Florida before opening of attraction
items.summary: Many died due to conditions at a warehouse they'd been shipped to, while others arrived dead, authorities say.
items.title_zh: 佛罗里达州31只树懒在景点开放前死亡
items.summary_zh: 当局称，许多人因被运往的仓库的条件而死亡，而其他人则在抵达时死亡。

items.title: US justice department drops probe into Fed chairman Jerome Powell
items.summary: President Donald Trump had accused Powell of improper cost overruns in renovating the Fed's building.
items.title_zh: 美国司法部撤销对美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔的调查
items.summary_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统指责鲍威尔在翻修美联储大楼时成本超支。

items.title: US to allow firing squads, gas, and electrocution for federal executions
items.summary: In a memo, the Department of Justice says the move will "strengthen" the death penalty and deter crime.
items.title_zh: 美国允许联邦执行行刑队、毒气和电刑
items.summary_zh: 美国司法部在一份备忘录中表示，此举将“加强”死刑并威慑犯罪。

items.title: Indigenous Speakers Are Booed During Commemorations of Australia’s War Dead
items.summary: Dawn services for Anzac Day were disrupted in three cities. The hecklers seemed to be targeting a widespread Aboriginal custom meant to acknowledge the land’s original inhabitants.
items.title_zh: 原住民演讲者在澳大利亚阵亡将士纪念活动中遭到嘘声
items.summary_zh: 三个城市的澳新军团日黎明服务中断。质问者似乎针对的是一种广泛存在的原住民习俗，旨在承认这片土地上的原始居民。

items.title: Raqqa Showcases Syria’s Tumultuous Past
items.summary: The city on the Euphrates, once a cradle of civilization, suffered under a succession of recent rulers. Our visit found it hoping for change.
items.title_zh: 拉卡展示了叙利亚动荡的过去
items.summary_zh: 幼发拉底河畔的这座城市曾经是文明的摇篮，但在最近的一系列统治者的统治下遭受了苦难。我们的访问发现它希望有所改变。

items.title: On Iran’s Border, Cooking Oil Trade Is a Snapshot of the Country’s Struggles
items.summary: The war has exacerbated Iran’s economic crisis, forcing many to cross the border into Turkey to buy the most basic goods.
items.title_zh: 在伊朗边境，食用油贸易是该国斗争的缩影
items.summary_zh: 战争加剧了伊朗的经济危机，迫使许多人越过边境进入土耳其购买最基本的商品。

items.title: Bitcoin at $40,000 would be 'near-unprecedented' statistical outcome, analyst says
items.summary: Mean-reversion models suggest bearish targets imply a 0.4th percentile event, far beyond typical market corrections.
items.title_zh: 分析师表示，比特币价格达到 40,000 美元将是“近乎前所未有”的统计结果
items.summary_zh: 均值回归模型表明，看跌目标意味着 0.4 个百分点的事件，远远超出了典型的市场调整。

items.title: Europe’s banks are going all in on crypto
items.summary: Brahimi explores the impact of European banks' integration of digital assets into their existing brokerage and payments infrastructure in the wake of MiCA.
items.title_zh: 欧洲银行正在全力投资加密货币
items.summary_zh: Brahimi 探讨了 MiCA 后欧洲银行将数字资产整合到其现有经纪和支付基础设施中的影响。

items.title: U.S. CFTC adds New York to string of states its suing to stop prediction market pushback
items.summary: The federal regulator has been suing states that seek to curtail prediction markets activity and claim it should be deemed state-regulated gaming.
items.title_zh: 美国商品期货交易委员会将纽约纳入其起诉以阻止预测市场抵制的一系列州之列
items.summary_zh: 联邦监管机构一直在起诉试图限制预测市场活动的州，并声称其应被视为州监管的游戏。

items.title: Brazil blocks Kalshi, Polymarket in sweeping ban citing investor protections
items.summary: Finance Minister Dario Durigan said some 28 betting platforms were banned in the country amid rising concerns about online gambling.
items.title_zh: 巴西以保护投资者为由全面禁止 Kalshi 和 Polymarket
items.summary_zh: 财政部长达里奥·杜里根 (Dario Durigan) 表示，由于对在线赌博的担忧日益加剧，该国约有 28 个赌博平台被禁止。

items.title: Tennessee bans crypto ATMs statewide, joining Indiana in fraud crackdown
items.summary: The law, which passed unanimously, extends liability beyond crypto ATM operators to businesses hosting the machines.
items.title_zh: 田纳西州在全州范围内禁止加密货币 ATM，加入印第安纳州打击欺诈行为
items.summary_zh: 这项一致通过的法律将责任从加密 ATM 运营商扩展到托管机器的企业。

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.5
items.summary: Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 GPT-5.5，这是我们迄今为止最智能的模型，速度更快、功能更强大，专为跨工具编码、研究和数据分析等复杂任务而构建。

items.title: GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty
items.summary: Explore the GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty: a red-teaming challenge to find universal jailbreaks for bio safety risks, with rewards up to $25,000.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 生物错误赏金
items.summary_zh: 探索 GPT-5.5 生物错误赏金：一项红队挑战，旨在寻找生物安全风险的通用越狱方法，奖励高达 25,000 美元。

items.title: 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
items.summary: Three new agentic safety and policy features integrated into Ads Advisor will help protect and streamline your Google Ads account.
items.title_zh: Ads Advisor 让 Google Ads 更安全、更快速的 3 种新方法
items.summary_zh: Ads Advisor 中集成的三项新的代理安全和政策功能将有助于保护和简化您的 Google Ads 帐户。

items.title: New ways to create personalized images in the Gemini app
items.summary: Nano Banana 2 now uses your personal context and Google Photos to create images that reflect your unique life.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini 应用程序中创建个性化图像的新方法
items.summary_zh: Nano Banana 2 现在使用您的个人背景和 Google Photos 来创建反映您独特生活的图像。

items.title: Bringing AI-driven protein-design tools to biologists everywhere
items.summary: Founded by Tristan Bepler PhD ’20 and former MIT professor Tim Lu PhD ’07, OpenProtein.AI offers researchers open-source models and other tools for protein engineering.
items.title_zh: 为世界各地的生物学家带来人工智能驱动的蛋白质设计工具
items.summary_zh: OpenProtein.AI 由 Tristan Bepler 博士 '20 和前麻省理工学院教授 Tim Lu 博士 '07 创立，为研究人员提供开源模型和其他蛋白质工程工具。

items.title: New technique makes AI models leaner and faster while they’re still learning
items.summary: Researchers use control theory to shed unnecessary complexity from AI models during training, cutting compute costs without sacrificing performance.
items.title_zh: 新技术使人工智能模型在学习过程中变得更精简、更快
items.summary_zh: 研究人员利用控制理论在训练过程中消除人工智能模型不必要的复杂性，在不牺牲性能的情况下降低计算成本。

items.title: Explosions and gunfire as armed groups launch co-ordinated attacks across Mali
items.summary: Witnesses report clashes in the centre and north, in what has been described as the largest jihadist attack in years.
items.title_zh: 武装团体在马里各地发动协同袭击，发生爆炸和枪击事件
items.summary_zh: 目击者称中部和北部发生冲突，这被称为多年来最大规模的圣战袭击。

items.title: How Anthropic’s Mythos model is forcing the crypto industry to rethink everything about security
items.summary: DeFi leaders say that AI will arm both attackers and defenders, and widen the gap between projects that prioritize security and those that do not.
items.title_zh: Anthropic 的神话模型如何迫使加密行业重新思考有关安全的一切
items.summary_zh: DeFi 领导人表示，人工智能将为攻击者和防御者提供武装，并扩大优先考虑安全的项目与不优先考虑安全的项目之间的差距。

items.title: Bitcoin falls after Trump reportedly canceled Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner's Iran-talks trip
items.summary: Trump is expected to speak at his crypto conference in Palm Beach shortly.
items.title_zh: 据报道特朗普取消了史蒂夫·威特科夫和贾里德·库什纳的伊朗会谈之旅后比特币下跌
items.summary_zh: 预计特朗普很快将在棕榈滩举行的加密货币会议上发表讲话。

items.title: Clock is ticking for bitcoin to prevent quantum threat as it could drain 6.9 million BTC including Satoshi’s
items.summary: Can a network without formal governance coordinate the biggest cryptographic migration in its history?
items.title_zh: 比特币防范量子威胁的时间紧迫，因为它可能会消耗 690 万枚比特币，其中包括中本聪的比特币
items.summary_zh: 没有正式治理的网络能否协调其历史上最大的加密货币迁移？

items.title: Ethereum Foundation sells nearly $24 million of ETH to Tom Lee’s Bitmine
items.summary: Bitmine Immersion also spent about $10 million when it bought 5,000 ETH from the Ethereum Foundation last month.
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金会向 Tom Lee 的 Bitmine 出售近 2400 万美元的 ETH
items.summary_zh: Bitmine Immersion 上个月还花费了约 1000 万美元从以太坊基金会购买了 5,000 个 ETH。

items.title: Training and Finetuning Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
items.title_zh: 使用句子变压器训练和微调多模态嵌入和重排序模型

items.title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
items.summary: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.
items.title_zh: 我们正在推出两款针对代理时代的专用 TPU。
items.summary_zh: 第八代谷歌 TPU 包括两个专用芯片，将为人工智能的未来提供动力。

items.title: A new way to explore the web with AI Mode in Chrome
items.summary: Today’s upgrades for AI Mode in Chrome transform how you interact with the web
items.title_zh: 通过 Chrome 中的 AI 模式探索网络的新方式
items.summary_zh: 今天 Chrome 中 AI 模式的升级改变了您与网络交互的方式

items.title: MIT scientists build the world’s largest collection of Olympiad-level math problems, and open it to everyone
items.summary: New dataset of 30,000-plus competition math problems from 47 countries gives AI researchers a harder test — and students worldwide a better training ground.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的科学家们建立了世界上最大的奥林匹克级数学问题集，并向所有人开放
items.summary_zh: 来自 47 个国家的 30,000 多个竞赛数学问题的新数据集为人工智能研究人员提供了更难的测试，也为世界各地的学生提供了更好的训练场。

items.title: Teaching AI models to say “I’m not sure”
items.summary: A new training method improves the reliability of AI confidence estimates without sacrificing performance, addressing a root cause of hallucination in reasoning models.
items.title_zh: 教人工智能模型说“我不确定”
items.summary_zh: 一种新的训练方法在不牺牲性能的情况下提高了人工智能置信度估计的可靠性，解决了推理模型中产生幻觉的根本原因。

items.title: A philosophy of work
items.summary: As the NC Ethics of Technology Postdoctoral Fellow, Michal Masny is advancing dialogue, teaching, and research into the social and ethical dimensions of new computing technologies.
items.title_zh: 工作哲学
items.summary_zh: 作为北卡罗来纳州技术伦理学博士后研究员，Michal Masny 正在推进新计算技术的社会和伦理层面的对话、教学和研究。

items.title: Foreign car companies bet on technology to hang onto once-lucrative China auto market
items.summary: U.S., Korean and German automakers announced a rush of new, tech-enabled cars at the Beijing Auto Show as they battle a sales slump
items.title_zh: 外国汽车公司押注技术以保住曾经利润丰厚的中国汽车市场
items.summary_zh: 美国、韩国和德国汽车制造商在北京车展上宣布推出大量新型科技汽车，以应对销量下滑

items.title: Risky meme trading is back. A trading rule change may have lit the fuse
items.summary: A regulatory shift is expected to remove barriers to rapid-fire trading and help revive a meme-stock frenzy.
items.title_zh: 高风险的模因交易又回来了。交易规则的改变可能点燃了导火索
items.summary_zh: 监管的转变预计将消除快速交易的障碍，并有助于重振迷因股票的狂热。

items.title: Seven dead in major Russian attack on Ukraine
items.summary: The city of Dnipro was hardest hit, with officials saying four died in a strike on a residential building.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯对乌克兰的重大袭击造成七人死亡
items.summary_zh: 第聂伯罗市受灾最严重，官员称，一栋住宅楼遭到袭击，造成四人死亡。

items.title: The viral manifesto of 'anti-woke' tech boss with NHS and defence contracts
items.summary: The boss of the controversial tech company with UK government contracts published a 22-point plan on the future of the West.
items.title_zh: “反觉醒”科技老板与 NHS 和国防合同的病毒宣言
items.summary_zh: 这家与英国政府签订合同、备受争议的科技公司的老板发表了一份关于西方未来的 22 点计划。

items.title: China car giant BYD says it can thrive without US
items.summary: With the price of fuel rising China's BYD says it is positioning itself to benefit from the global shift away from fossil fuels.
items.title_zh: 中国汽车巨头比亚迪表示，没有美国它也能蓬勃发展
items.summary_zh: 随着燃料价格的上涨，中国比亚迪表示，它正在将自己定位为从全球摆脱化石燃料的趋势中受益。

items.title: The 85-Year-Old Widow Snagged by Trump’s Immigration Crackdown
items.summary: In her first interview since being deported, Marie-Thérèse Ross-Mahé, the French widow of a former G.I., recounted her experience in ICE detention.
items.title_zh: 85岁寡妇因特朗普移民镇压而陷入困境
items.summary_zh: 前退伍军人的法国遗孀玛丽-泰蕾斯·罗斯-马赫 (Marie-Thérèse Ross-Mahé) 在被驱逐出境后的首次采访中讲述了她在 ICE 拘留期间的经历。

items.title: The Elite ‘Doctors’ Who Care for Mount Everest
items.summary: Glacial ice has sealed the gateway to Everest’s summit, keeping hundreds of climbers from reaching the top. “Icefall doctors” are on the case.
items.title_zh: 守护珠穆朗玛峰的精英“医生”
items.summary_zh: 冰川封住了珠穆朗玛峰顶峰的大门，使数百名登山者无法登顶。 “冰瀑布医生”正在处理此案。

items.title: Japan’s New Care Workers: Bodybuilders, Wrestlers and M.M.A. Fighters
items.summary: Young athletes are being recruited to plug a staff shortage in Japan’s nursing homes. The results are reshaping elder care.
items.title_zh: 日本的新护理工作者：健美运动员、摔跤运动员和 M.M.A.战士
items.summary_zh: 日本疗养院正在招募年轻运动员来解决人员短缺问题。结果正在重塑老年人护理。

items.title: Gaza Set to Hold First Local Election in Two Decades
items.summary: Hamas said it was not participating in the municipal elections in Deir al-Balah, set for this weekend. Residents said it was a long-awaited opportunity to address the city’s problems
items.title_zh: 加沙将举行二十年来的首次地方选举
items.summary_zh: 哈马斯表示，不会参加定于本周末举行的代尔巴拉赫市政选举。居民表示这是一个期待已久的解决城市问题的机会

items.title: In Britain, 7 Unelected Lords Help Block an Assisted Dying Bill
items.summary: A small group in the House of Lords proposed hundreds of amendments that helped stymie a bill that was meant to legalize medically assisted death for the terminally ill.
items.title_zh: 在英国，7 位非民选上议院议员帮助阻止了一项安乐死法案
items.summary_zh: 上议院的一个小团体提出了数百项修正案，帮助阻止了一项旨在使绝症患者的医疗协助死亡合法化的法案。

items.title: Mike Tyson, Tether CEO, Cathie Wood among speakers at Trump's 'most exclusive' crypto conference
items.summary: The event, at which Trump himself is scheduled to speak, gathers top-tier holders of the $TRUMP meme coin.
items.title_zh: Tether 首席执行官迈克·泰森 (Mike Tyson) 和凯西·伍德 (Cathie Wood) 在特朗普“最独家”的加密货币会议上发言
items.summary_zh: 特朗普本人计划在这次活动中发表讲话，云集了 $TRUMP meme 代币的顶级持有者。

items.title: Coinbase’s Jesse Pollak says AI agents are the next big wave for crypto payments
items.summary: Pollak, who will be speaking at Consensus Miami 2026 next month, also sees the open-source protocol x402 as a key part of that wave.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 的 Jesse Pollak 表示人工智能代理是加密支付的下一波浪潮
items.summary_zh: Pollak 将于下个月在 2026 年迈阿密共识大会上发表演讲，他也将开源协议 x402 视为这一浪潮的关键部分。

items.title: Ripple-linked XRP stalls near $1.44 as 'triangle squeeze' nears breakout
items.summary: Price holds in tight range after high-volume move, with compression signaling a decisive move as institutional demand quietly builds.
items.title_zh: 随着“三角挤压”即将突破，与瑞波币相关的 XRP 徘徊在 1.44 美元附近
items.summary_zh: 在成交量大幅波动后，价格保持在窄幅区间内，随着机构需求的悄然建立，压缩标志着决定性的走势。

items.title: Aave, Kelp, LayerZero ask Arbitrum DAO to release $71 million in frozen ETH to rsETH recovery effort
items.summary: The standard Constitutional AIP lifecycle runs roughly 49 days from forum publication to onchain execution, a timeline some delegates say is too long.
items.title_zh: Aave、Kelp、LayerZero 要求 Arbitrum DAO 释放 7100 万美元冻结的 ETH，用于 rsETH 恢复工作
items.summary_zh: 标准宪法 AIP 生命周期从论坛发布到链上执行大约需要 49 天，一些代表认为这个时间表太长。

items.title: Aave proposes 25,000 ETH contribution to DeFi United to plug Kelp DAO exploit hole
items.summary: Protocols and individual DeFi users have collectively pledged enough to cover the Kelp DAO exploit losses.
items.title_zh: Aave 提议向 DeFi United 捐赠 25,000 ETH，以堵塞 Kelp DAO 漏洞
items.summary_zh: 协议和个人 DeFi 用户已共同承诺足够的资金来弥补 Kelp DAO 漏洞造成的损失。

items.title: US sanctions Iran-linked crypto wallets, including addresses holding $344 million frozen by Tether: CNN
items.summary: The move comes a day after Tether froze $344 million worth of USDT, which has now been linked to Iran, CNN reported.
items.title_zh: 美国制裁与伊朗有关的加密钱包，其中包括被 Tether 冻结的 3.44 亿美元地址：CNN
items.summary_zh: 据 CNN 报道，此举是在 Tether 冻结了价值 3.44 亿美元的 USDT 一天后发生的，该 USDT 目前已与伊朗有关。

items.title: AWS Marketplace adds Chainlink data standards, enabling devs to link traditional computing services and blockchains
items.summary: AWS’s Chainlink integration will allow institutions to use familiar AWS tools while connecting securely to blockchains.
items.title_zh: AWS Marketplace 增加了 Chainlink 数据标准，使开发人员能够链接传统计算服务和区块链
items.summary_zh: AWS 的 Chainlink 集成将使机构能够使用熟悉的 AWS 工具，同时安全地连接到区块链。

items.title: DeFi Education Fund and other crypto leaders press SEC to lock in DeFi broker guidance
items.summary: The DeFi Education Fund and others are urging the SEC to formalize its recent decentralized finance interface guidance.
items.title_zh: DeFi 教育基金和其他加密货币领导者向 SEC 施压，要求锁定 DeFi 经纪人指导
items.summary_zh: DeFi 教育基金和其他机构正在敦促 SEC 正式确定其最近的去中心化金融接口指南。
